allow: PowerShell(Write-Host "=== 项目文件结构 ==="; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "--- 根目录 ---"; Get-ChildItem -File | Select-Object Name, Length; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "--- utils/ ---"; Get-ChildItem utils -File | Select-Object Name, Length; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "--- pages/ ---"; Get-ChildItem pages -Directory | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  [$\($_.Name\)]"; Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -File | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "    $\($_.Name\) \($\([math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB, 1\)\)KB\)" } }; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "--- cloudfunction/ ---"; Get-ChildItem cloudfunction -Recurse -File | Select-Object FullName, Length)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -File | Select-Object Name, @{N='KB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}}; Write-Host "---"; Get-ChildItem utils -File | Select-Object Name, @{N='KB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}})
